# polymarket_market (Data Source)

Fetches a single Polymarket prediction market by its numeric `id`, including its outcomes, current prices, and trading statistics.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single market by its numeric ID.
data "polymarket_market" "example" {
  id = "253123"
}

output "market_question" {
  value = data.polymarket_market.example.question
}

output "market_outcomes" {
  # Pairs each outcome with its current implied probability.
  value = zipmap(
    data.polymarket_market.example.outcomes,
    data.polymarket_market.example.outcome_prices,
  )
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the market to fetch, as assigned by Polymarket (for example `253123`). This is the only required input.

### Read-Only

- `accepting_orders` (Boolean) Whether the market is currently accepting new orders.
- `active` (Boolean) Whether the market is currently active and accepting trades.
- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the market has been archived and hidden from the default UI.
- `best_ask` (Number) Current best (lowest) ask price for the primary outcome, in `[0, 1]`.
- `best_bid` (Number) Current best (highest) bid price for the primary outcome, in `[0, 1]`.
- `clob_token_ids` (List of String) CLOB ERC-1155 token IDs for each outcome, used to query the order book; aligns with `outcomes`.
- `closed` (Boolean) Whether the market has closed and no longer accepts trades.
- `competitive` (Number) Polymarket's competitiveness score for the market, in `[0, 1]`; higher is more liquid/tighter.
- `condition_id` (String) On-chain condition ID (a `0x`-prefixed hash) linking the market to its CTF contract.
- `created_at` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the market record was created.
- `description` (String) Long-form description and resolution criteria explaining how the market settles.
- `enable_order_book` (Boolean) Whether a CLOB order book is enabled for this market.
- `end_date` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the market is scheduled to close.
- `group_item_title` (String) Short label distinguishing this market within its parent event group, when grouped.
- `icon` (String) URL of the market's icon image.
- `image` (String) URL of the market's banner image.
- `last_trade_price` (Number) Price at which the primary outcome most recently traded, in `[0, 1]`.
- `liquidity` (String) Total liquidity available in the market, in USDC, as a decimal string.
- `order_min_size` (Number) Minimum order size accepted by the order book, in shares.
- `order_price_min_tick_size` (Number) Smallest price increment accepted by the order book (e.g. `0.01`).
- `outcome_prices` (List of String) Current price (implied probability in `[0, 1]`) of each outcome as a decimal string; aligns with `outcomes`.
- `outcomes` (List of String) Ordered list of outcome names, e.g. `["Yes", "No"]`; aligns positionally with `outcome_prices` and `clob_token_ids`.
- `question` (String) Human-readable question the market resolves, e.g. `Will candidate X win?`.
- `question_id` (String) On-chain question ID (a `0x`-prefixed hash) used by the UMA oracle to resolve the market.
- `resolution_source` (String) Source of truth consulted to resolve the market, when specified.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug identifying the market on polymarket.com.
- `spread` (Number) Current bid-ask spread of the market's primary outcome.
- `start_date` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the market opened for trading.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the market record was last updated.
- `volume` (String) Cumulative trading volume of the market, in USDC, as a decimal string.
- `volume_1mo` (Number) Trading volume over the trailing month, in USDC.
- `volume_1wk` (Number) Trading volume over the trailing week, in USDC.
- `volume_1yr` (Number) Trading volume over the trailing year, in USDC.
- `volume_24hr` (Number) Trading volume over the trailing 24 hours, in USDC.
